description: Automatizar todo: email, SMS, whatsapp, webhook. Herramientas: n8n, Zapier, Make.

items.principle: Triggers: Nueva orden → factura email. 7d sin compra → 'te extrañamos'. Bajo stock → alert admin.
items.tactic: n8n workflow: Order placed (trigger) → gen invoice (webhook) → send email (SMTP) → log (DB). 0 manual work.

items.principle: Conectar sistemas: Stripe → DB → email → CRM. Cada transición automática.
items.tactic: Zapier: Stripe payment → Google Sheets (log) → HubSpot (contact) → Slack (notification). No manual data entry.
